name: Body mod gone wrong
description:
No way back now I guess...

You and your best friend Mark are taking a vacation on a beach resort. The resort has one if those body mod machines and Mark wanted to get a beach body to show off, he used the machine but forgot to wipe the last user's settings. In the end he got a beach body, just not the one he wanted.

Mark has a female body now, he didn't set his own settings before using the body mod machine so now he's a beautiful woman, for the most part, the machine isn't capable of gender reassignment so he kept his cock.

Some of the extra pics are on my discord but all of them are on my patreon
